channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Christmas shooting at Phoenix airport leaves 3 people wounded, 1 stabbed
item.description: Authorities are investigating a Christmas shooting at Sky Harbor Airport in Phoenix that left three people injured by gunfire and another person stabbed. Police said the incident was related to a family dispute.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What is known about a plane crash in Kazakhstan that killed 38 of 67 people on board
item.description: An Azerbaijani airliner has crashed in Kazakhstan after being diverted, killing 38 of 67 people on board. Some experts alleged that the plane went down after being hit by Russian air defense systems.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: JonBenet Ramsey’s father plans 'important meeting' with Boulder police chief, DNA lab rep
item.description: JonBenet Ramsey's father, John Ramsey, says he plans to meet with the Boulder, Colorado, police chief next month to discuss the possibility of testing crime-scene evidence for DNA.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Most disastrous freak accidents of 2024: 7 times everyday fun turned fatal
item.description: From a deadly skydiving accident to a terrifying pool electrocution, here are several freak accidents that astonished audiences in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NYC stabbing: Man arrested in connection to unprovoked attack at Grand Central on Christmas Eve
item.description: NYPD officials confirmed that a suspect was taken into custody after two people were slashed in separate attacks inside the Grand Central-42nd Street subway station on Christmas Eve.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump announces ambassador to Panama amid fight over canal
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday announced Miami-Dade County Commissioner Kevin Marino Cabrera as his pick for U.S. ambassador to Panama. The announcement comes as Trump is sparking a feud with the U.S. ally over control of the Panama Canal.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pope calls for nations to overcome divisions in Christmas address as communities celebrate worldwide
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — Pope Francis in his traditional Christmas message on Wednesday urged “all people of all nations” to find courage during this Holy Year “to silence the sounds of arms and overcome divisions” plaguing the world, from the Middle East to Ukraine, Africa to Asia.
item.dc:creator: SILVIA STELLACCI and COLLEEN BARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blake Lively's claims that movie co-star launched smear campaign gets support in publicist's suit
item.description: Blake Lively's claims that “It Ends With Us” director and co-star Justin Baldoni unleashed a smear campaign against her have gained support from a new lawsuit that Baldoni's former publicist filed against him.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trial of man accused in Florida Trump assassination attempt pushed back to September
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — A man accused of attempting to assassinate President-elect Donald Trump in South Florida won't be tried until September 2025, a federal judge ruled this week. Ryan Routh's trial will begin Sept. 8 instead of the previously scheduled Feb. 10, 2025 start date, U.S.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Hawaii crime boss dies of overdose in federal custody: medical examiner
item.description: Michael Miske died of "toxicity of fentanyl and para-fluorofentanyl," the medical examiner’s office said in a statement obtained by AP. The death appears to have been accidental.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Azerbaijani airliner with 67 people onboard crashes in Kazakhstan leaving 32 survivors
item.description: An Azerbaijani airliner with 67 people onboard crashed Wednesday near the Kazakhstani city of Aktau, leaving at least 32 survivors, according to officials. More than 30 people may be dead.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fate of Trump's Cabinet picks unclear as Republicans prepare to take power in Senate
item.description: The fate of President-elect Donald Trump’s Cabinet is still unclear after Republican senators spent much of December carefully dodging questions.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Critics warn of 'Daniel Penny effect’ after woman burned alive on NYC subway car as bystanders watched
item.description: Critics are sounding the alarm over the "Daniel Penny effect" happening after a woman was burned alive on an NYC subway train as people stood by and recorded.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stunning photos show lava erupting from Hawaii's Kilauea volcano
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — One of the world's most active volcanoes spewed lava into the air for a second straight day on Tuesday. The eruption of Kilauea volcano on Hawaii's Big Island has stayed within the mountain's summit caldera inside Hawaii Volcanoes National Park. No homes were threatened.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden signs a bill officially making the bald eagle the national bird of the US
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The bald eagle, a symbol of the power and strength of the United States for more than 240 years, earned an overdue honor on Tuesday: It officially became the country's national bird.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fiery boat explosion in Florida marina leaves one dead, several injured
item.description: First responders were at the Lauderdale Marina in Florida Monday night, after a boat explosion that left one person dead and five others injured.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Bill Clinton discharged after hospitalization for flu
item.description: Former President Clinton was discharged Tuesday morning after being hospitalized a day earlier for flu, according to his spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Eye drops recalled nationwide due to fungal contamination
item.description: The recall was issued after a consumer complained of a "foreign material" they found in a sealed vial of the eye drops.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Self, NewsNation

item.title: Eye drops recalled nationwide due to fungal contamination
item.description: Check your medicine cabinets: A brand of eye drops sold nationally has been recalled due to the presence of fungus, which may cause vision damage.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Self, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Second US Navy fighter jet narrowly avoided being shot down in 'friendly fire' incident: source
item.description: An F/A-18 Super Hornet – flying a few miles behind the Hornet that was shot down in a "friendly fire" incident over the Red Sea – took evasive maneuvers after a second surface-to-air missile was fired from the cruiser USS Gettysburg, a source with knowledge of the incident tells Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark raised the profile of women's basketball to unprecedented levels in both the college ranks and the WNBA, and Tuesday she was named the AP Female Athlete of the Year for her impact on and off the court.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart illegally opened bank accounts for 1 million drivers, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Walmart and fintech company Branch Messenger are being sued by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau for allegedly forcing more than one million delivery workers to use expensive deposit accounts to access their paychecks.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: American Airlines experiences 'technical issue' with all flights on Christmas Eve
item.description: American Airlines is reportedly experiencing delays on the morning of Christmas Eve due to what the airline called a "technical issue.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Jones, KRON4

item.title: Bill Clinton admitted to hospital with fever
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton was admitted to a Washington hospital on Monday with a fever, his spokesperson said on social media.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani wins 3rd AP Male Athlete of the Year award, tying Michael Jordan for 1 shy of record
item.description: The Japanese superstar caps 2024 by winning The Associated Press Male Athlete of the Year for the third time, tying him with basketball great Michael Jordan. He trails only four-time winners Lance Armstrong, Tiger Woods and LeBron James.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump again calls to buy Greenland after eyeing Canada and the Panama Canal
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — First it was Canada, then the Panama Canal. Now, Donald Trump again wants Greenland. The president-elect is renewing unsuccessful calls he made during his first term for the U.S.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Congress looks to ban Chinese drones widely used in US: What to know about the debate
item.description: Lawmakers in Washington are seeking to ban new sales of drones from two dominant Chinese manufacturers, arguing they could be used to spy on Americans and that the low-cost models are hurting the U.S. drone industry.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: Unidentified flying objects spotted soaring over Midwest, East Coast skies
item.description: Several videos of mysterious, unidentified objects were taken over the weekend across the Midwest and East Coast.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden didn't remove these 3 inmates from death row
item.description: Those who received the Monday commutations of their sentences saw them go from execution to life with no possibility of parole. However, three “hard cases” were not among the commutations.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5
